mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO object_replication_checkpoint ( checkpoint_key, last_id, status, last_error, done_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{checkpointKey}, #{lastId}, #{status}, #{lastError}, #{doneAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT checkpoint_key AS checkpointKey, last_id AS lastId, status, last_error AS lastError, done_at AS doneAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM object_replication_checkpoint WHERE checkpoint_key = #{checkpointKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE object_replication_checkpoint SET status = 'running', last_id = #{lastId}, last_error = #{lastError}, done_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE checkpoint_key = #{checkpointKey}
UPDATE object_replication_checkpoint SET status = 'done', last_id = #{lastId}, last_error = #{lastError}, done_at = #{doneAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE checkpoint_key = #{checkpointKey}
